description_long: This is a modern military jet aircraft with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and a pointed nose cone, painted in a blue digital camouflage pattern. The airplane features twin vertical stabilizers at the rear, swept-back wings with sharp angles, and two large jet engines mounted at the back. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a dark, tinted canopy, likely accommodating two crew members in tandem. The wings are low-mounted with noticeable anhedral angles and lack visible winglets. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it is likely retractable and stowed within the fuselage. The overall design is optimized for high-speed flight and maneuverability, typical of advanced fighter jets.
description: A blue digital-camouflage military jet with swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a pointed nose cone. Features a forward, enclosed cockpit and dual rear jet engines.
description_view_0: Front-left perspective showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and the full span of the swept-back wings.
description_view_1: Left-rear view highlighting the twin jet engines, twin vertical stabilizers, and the angular wing design.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the two large jet exhausts and the symmetry of the tail and wings.
description_view_3: Side profile displaying the length of the fuselage, the cockpit placement, and the vertical stabilizers.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and pronounced anhedral angles; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers at the rear.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear (not visible in images).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a tandem seating arrangement under a tinted canopy.
